Title: User Creation Process
Test Data:
- Valid user details (email, name, surname)
- Invalid user details (empty fields, invalid email format)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user creation page.
2. Enter valid user details and submit.
3. Check if the user is created successfully.
4. Enter invalid user details and submit.
5. Check if the user creation fails.
Expected Result:
1. User creation form is displayed.
2. User is created successfully with valid details.
3. Error messages are shown for invalid user details.

Title: User Authentication Process
Test Data:
- Valid credentials (email, password)
- Invalid credentials (wrong email, wrong password)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter valid credentials and submit.
3. Check if the user is authenticated successfully.
4. Enter invalid credentials and submit.
5. Check if the user authentication fails.
Expected Result:
1. Login form is displayed.
2. User is authenticated successfully with valid credentials.
3. Error messages are shown for invalid credentials.

Title: Associate Post with Neighborhood
Preconditions: User is logged in, valid neighborhood exists
Test Data:
- Valid neighborhood code
- Invalid neighborhood code (nonexistent code)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the post creation page.
2. Select a valid neighborhood and submit.
3. Check if the post is associated with the neighborhood.
4. Select an invalid neighborhood and submit.
5. Check if the post creation fails due to invalid neighborhood.
Expected Result:
1. Post creation form is displayed with neighborhood selection.
2. Post is associated with the selected neighborhood.
3. Error messages are shown for invalid neighborhood.

Title: Navigate from Home Screen
Test Data:
- Click on profile photo
- Click on notifications icon
- Interaction with map
- Click on home access icon
- Click on personal profile access icon
- Click on chat access icon
- Click on general archive access icon
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the home screen.
2. Click on profile photo.
3. Check if the profile section is displayed.
4. Click on notifications icon.
5. Check if the notification section is displayed.
6. Interact with the map.
7. Check if the map full-screen API is invoked.
8. Click on home access icon.
9. Check if the home screen is displayed.
10. Click on personal profile access icon.
11. Check if the profile section is displayed.
12. Click on chat access icon.
13. Check if the chat section is displayed.
14. Click on general archive access icon.
15. Check if the general dashboard is displayed.
Expected Result:
1. Home screen is displayed.
2. Profile section is displayed after clicking on profile photo.
3. Notification section is displayed after clicking on notifications icon.
4. Map full-screen API is invoked after interacting with the map.
5. Home screen is displayed after clicking on home access icon.
6. Profile section is displayed after clicking on personal profile access icon.
7. Chat section is displayed after clicking on chat access icon.
8. General dashboard is displayed after clicking on general archive access icon.

Title: Browse Shared Posts
Test Data:
- Valid post content
- Invalid post content (empty field)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the general dashboard.
2. Scroll through shared posts.
3. Click on a specific post.
4. Check if the post is loaded successfully.
5. Add a comment to the post.
6. Submit the comment.
7. Check if the comment is saved successfully.
Expected Result:
1. General dashboard is displayed.
2. Shared posts are loaded successfully.
3. Specific post is loaded successfully after clicking.
4. Comment is added successfully with valid content.
5. Comment is saved successfully after submission.
6. Error messages are shown for invalid comment content.

Title: Search and View Profiles
Test Data:
- Valid resident profile
- Valid business profile
- Valid professional profile
- Invalid profile (nonexistent profile)
Test Steps:
1. Perform a search for a resident profile.
2. Check if the resident profile is displayed.
3. Add the resident profile to contacts.
4. Check if the chat interaction is initiated.
5. Perform a search for a business profile.
6. Check if the business profile is displayed.
7. View unsold items.
8. Check if the unsold items are displayed.
9. View promotions.
10. Check if the promotions are displayed.
11. Make an appointment.
12. Check if the calendar is displayed.
13. Confirm the successful operation.
14. Check if the confirmation is displayed.
15. Perform a search for an invalid profile.
16. Check if an error message is displayed.
Expected Result:
1. Resident profile is displayed after searching.
2. Chat interaction is initiated after adding to contacts.
3. Business profile is displayed after searching.
4. Unsold items are displayed after viewing.
5. Promotions are displayed after viewing.
6. Calendar is displayed after making an appointment.
7. Confirmation is displayed after confirming the operation.
8. Error message is displayed for an invalid profile.

Title: User Existence and Creation
Test Steps:
1. Send valid credentials to StoredDataDB for authorization.
2. Check if the user is authorized.
3. Send nonexistent user credentials to UserCreateProcedure for authentication.
4. Check if the user is authenticated.
5. Create a new entry in StoredDataDB.
6. Check if the new entry is created successfully.
Expected Result:
1. User is authorized with valid credentials.
2. User is authenticated with nonexistent user credentials.
3. New entry is created successfully in StoredDataDB.

Title: User Nonexistence and Creation
Preconditions: User does not exist in the database
Test Steps:
1. Send nonexistent user credentials to StoredDataDB for authorization.
2. Check if the user is not authorized.
3. Send nonexistent user credentials to UserCreateProcedure for authentication.
4. Check if the user is authenticated.
5. Create a new entry in StoredDataDB.
6. Check if the new entry is created successfully.
Expected Result:
1. User is not authorized with nonexistent user credentials.
2. User is authenticated with nonexistent user credentials.
3. New entry is created successfully in StoredDataDB.

Title: User Existence and Authorization
Test Steps:
1. Send valid user credentials to StoredDataDB for authorization.
2. Check if the user is authorized.
3. Send valid user credentials to UserCreateProcedure for authentication.
4. Check if the user is not authenticated.
5. No new entry is created in StoredDataDB.
Expected Result:
1. User is authorized with valid user credentials.
2. User is not authenticated with valid user credentials.
3. No new entry is created in StoredDataDB.
